One of the most resin-rich landrace indicas in existence, cultivated in the flatlands near the Uzbek border. Known as 'the king of Afghan hash' and used for millennia for traditional hashish production.
Mazar-i-Sharif is a UNESCO World Heritage city and one of the key historic cannabis-producing regions in the world.
A high-altitude Himalayan landrace traditionally grown in the Parvati Valley of India for the production of Malana Cream charas — one of the world's most coveted hand-rubbed hashishes.
Malana Cream charas from this region commands the highest prices of any hashish in the world and has its own distinct caste system among growers.

The broad family of Jamaican landrace genetics that gave the world Lamb's Bread and dozens of other tropical sativas. Characterized by soaring cerebral highs tied to the Rastafarian spiritual tradition.
Jamaican cannabis cultivation has been documented since the 19th century and is deeply embedded in both Rastafarian religion and Jamaican national identity.
A rare pure sativa from the highlands of Rwanda known for its exceptionally fine aroma — sweet, floral and fruity. Delivers a gentle energizing effect used in traditional Rwandan culture.
Rwandan cannabis was documented by Belgian colonial records as a major agricultural crop grown across the Great Lakes region of Central Africa.
An East African coastal sativa grown along the shores of the Indian Ocean. Produces a mellow, social high reminiscent of other African landraces with a distinctly citrus-earth aroma.
Mozambican cannabis was historically traded across the Indian Ocean spice routes to South Asia and the Middle East.

Sensi Seeds' homage to Jimi Hendrix. Jack Flash combines the psychedelic Haze genetics with Skunk's commercial vigor to deliver a powerful cerebral high in a more manageable plant structure than pure Haze.
Jack Flash is named after the Rolling Stones song and Jimi Hendrix's style — though the 'Jack' in the name is a nod to Jack Herer genetics.

Named for cannabis advocate Dr. Lester Grinspoon. A nearly pure Haze variety with minimal bud structure and maximum terpene expression — completely unusual-looking compared to any other strain. An extreme collector's piece.
Dr. Lester Grinspoon of Harvard Medical School wrote 'Marihuana Reconsidered' in 1971 — one of the first mainstream academic arguments for cannabis legalization.

A true Hawaiian classic from the 1970s that defined the 'island high' experience — light, tropical, purely uplifting with sweet pineapple and citrus notes. One of the most beloved strains of the counterculture era.
Maui Wowie was the premier cannabis of the 1970s surf culture and one of the first strains to be marketed specifically for its geographic origin.
TH Seeds' acclaimed hybrid balancing a classic California sativa with Afghani structure. SAGE delivers a clean, long-lasting cerebral high with a distinctive sage and sandalwood aroma.
SAGE won the High Times Cannabis Cup in 2001 and helped establish TH Seeds as one of the preeminent cannabis breeding operations in the world.

Created by Vic High of BC Growers, Space Queen combines Romulan's indica mass with C99's cerebral explosion. Delivers an unusually sweet, fruity aroma with euphoric effects that transport the mind somewhere otherworldly.
Space Queen is one of BC's most beloved legacy strains and a parent of Jack the Ripper and several other celebrated hybrids.

An accidental but legendary strain created by a Hawaiian Romulan male accidentally pollinating an Island Sweet Skunk female in Topeka, Kansas. A perfectly balanced tropical-citrus sativa-leaning hybrid.
Golden Goat is one of the few iconic American cannabis strains to originate in the Midwest rather than on the West Coast.

Sensi Seeds' powerhouse four-way indica cross combining the best heavy indica genetics. Black Domina is one of the heaviest, most sedating pure indicas commercially available — recommended only at night.
Black Domina is the indica benchmark against which all other heavy indicas are measured — Sensi Seeds' definitive statement on what an indica can be.

One of the most popular pure indica strains to emerge from California's Bay Area. Purple Kush delivers total body relaxation with a sedating, long-lasting blissful effect and a sweet, earthy grape aroma.
Purple Kush is consistently one of the top 10 most-searched strains on Leafly and has been so for over a decade.

A perfectly balanced cross of two California classics. Blueberry Headband marries the sweet berry of DJ Short's Blueberry with the cerebral pressure sensation of Headband to create a uniquely clear-headed hybrid.
Blueberry Headband represents the 'second generation' of California cannabis breeding — combining two signature Northern California strains into something greater than both.

Famous for the sensation of pressure users feel around their temples — like wearing a headband. Headband's combination of OG Kush and Sour Diesel creates long-lasting, creamy, dreamy euphoria with serious potency.
Headband gets its name from the pressure sensation users feel around their temples after smoking — a unique effect that makes it instantly recognizable.

Despite its name, LSD doesn't produce psychedelic effects — it just produces an unusually potent, clear-headed cerebral high. Barneys Farm's award-winning creation combines Mazar's heaviness with Skunk's vigor for exceptional yield and potency.
LSD won the Cannabis Cup in 2008 and was one of Barney's Farm's first major international award-winning strains.

One of the highest-yielding sativa hybrids ever bred. Dinafem's Moby Dick crosses White Widow's resin production with Haze's cerebral glory to create a massive-yielding, potent sativa that consistently performs at commercial scale.
Moby Dick has broken yield records in multiple grow competitions and consistently produces some of the highest per-plant sativa yields of any hybrid.

Barney's Farm's three-way cross combining three distinct landrace genetics. Sweet Tooth delivers a surprisingly complex sweet, floral aroma and gentle balanced effects despite its all-landrace lineage.
Sweet Tooth won the Cannabis Cup in 2000 and introduced many European cannabis consumers to the concept of terpene-forward breeding focused on aroma and flavor.
A fruity indica classic named for the overwhelming tropical mango scent it produces. One of the most flavor-forward strains of its era, with a sweet myrcene-rich terpene profile.
Mango's extraordinarily fruity aroma is driven by exceptionally high myrcene content — one of the highest recorded in the late-1990s era of cannabis genetics.
Originating in Indiana and refined by companies in the Netherlands, Bubblegum's sweet, artificial-bubblegum candy aroma launched the flavored cannabis breeding trend. Multiple Cannabis Cup winner.
Bubblegum was one of the first strains bred specifically for an artificial-candy aroma rather than classic cannabis terps — pioneering the flavor-forward breeding movement of the 1990s.
A stocky, powerful indica derived from White Widow with an even heavier yield and more sedating effect profile. Named for its stubby, horned appearance during flowering.
White Rhino was developed by Great White Shark Seeds as a high-yield commercial derivative of White Widow — sacrificing some of White Widow's cerebral energy for more knockout body weight.

Barney's Farm's Cannabis Cup-winning strain with a vivid citrus-orange aroma and balanced euphoric effects. Tangerine Dream's commercial success inspired the first wave of Tangie-style citrus breeding.
Tangerine Dream won the Cannabis Cup in 2012 and directly inspired the breeding of Tangie, which itself became the pillar of an entirely new citrus-forward breeding movement.
Barneys Farm's British contribution — Pineapple Chunk combines UK Cheese genetics with pineapple sweetness and Skunk foundation. An unusually easy-to-grow hybrid with exceptional bag appeal.
Pineapple Chunk is one of the few UK-bred strains to achieve significant international commercial success, winning multiple awards in European Cannabis Cup competitions.

BC's answer to OG Kush — a dominant OG phenotype that became a West Coast legend. Pink Kush's candy-sweet, vanilla floral aroma and full-body knockout made it Canada's most beloved indica for decades.
Pink Kush consistently tops Canadian cannabis sales charts and was one of the first strains to develop dedicated 'Pink Kush only' consumer followings in the BC market.

Apothecary Genetics' deep purple indica with an intense grape candy aroma. Grape Ape's relaxing, heavy body effects and visually arresting purple buds made it a dispensary staple and a key parent strain.
Grape Ape is a parent strain of Gelato through its contribution to the 'purple' genetics used in Sunset Sherbet — an indirect but significant genetic contribution.
Named after the French king famous for his love of luxury. King Louis is a California dispensary staple — a heavy OG Kush variant with an earthy pine and skunk aroma and a deeply sedating effect.
King Louis XIII is named after the French monarch who reportedly died in 1643 from a cannabis-laced pipe — though this historical claim is disputed by scholars.
A crossing of Fire OG and The White that produces extraordinary trichome coverage and a fuel-dominant aroma. WiFi OG (White Fire OG) is one of the most reliably potent OG-family hybrids available.
WiFi OG's nickname 'White Fire' refers to the white-ash quality of its combustion — a sign of proper flushing and curing — not the wireless standard.

Cali Connection's powerhouse OG cross produces one of the most intensely psychoactive hybrid effects available — Alien OG hits the mind first with a spacial, almost dissociative euphoria before settling into heavy body relaxation.
Alien OG's name references both its extraterrestrial-level potency and its Alien Kush parent strain — Cali Connection's way of saying this strain is from another world.

The original Bubba Kush phenotype collected before 1998, before it was refined and distributed commercially. Pre-98 Bubba represents the purest expression of Bubba Kush genetics — heavier and more complex than later versions.
Pre-98 Bubba Kush clones are among the most protected genetics in California — original cuts from before 1998 are considered invaluable horticultural heritage.

Serious Seeds collaboration producing one of the finest fruit-forward hybrids available. Strawberry Banana's complex strawberry-banana tropical aroma and heavy relaxing effects earned it multiple cannabis awards.
Strawberry Banana won multiple Cannabis Cup awards in 2015 and helped establish Florida as a legitimate cannabis genetics development hub.
Humboldt Seed Company's premium hybrid with a rich vanilla-cream aroma. Delivers a smooth, full-body euphoria with cerebral clarity — one of the smoothest smoking indulgent strains of the modern era.
Vanilla Frosting is one of Humboldt Seed Company's most awarded commercial strains and exemplifies the Northern California farm-to-table cannabis ethos.
An explosive three-way OG cross producing intense fuel aromas and knockout sedative effects. High Octane OG's name perfectly describes both the chemical terpene profile and the high-powered effect.
High Octane OG is a benchmark strain for OG Kush terpene complexity and is frequently used in sensory evaluation training for cannabis industry professionals.

A cross of two famously pungent strains creating one of the most aggressively aromatic modern strains. Garlic Breath produces extraordinary resin, complex savory-pharmaceutical terpenes, and deeply sedating effects.
Garlic Breath joins GMO Cookies in defining the 'savory' category of modern cannabis — strains bred for complex non-sweet terpene profiles aimed at connoisseur markets.

Named after the sour-then-sweet candy, this hybrid delivers a sharp, sour citrus punch that mellows into a sweet, smooth, euphoric high. An accessible, crowd-pleasing hybrid with excellent bag appeal.
Sour Patch consistently ranks as one of the top 20 most-reviewed Hybrid strains on Leafly due to its approachable effect profile and memorable flavor.

A natural combination of two Cookies family pillars. Sherblato merges Sunset Sherbet's energetic citrus uplift with Gelato's creamy sweetness for a perfectly balanced, flavor-rich euphoric experience.
Sherblato is considered one of the most 'balanced' Cookies family crosses — equally appealing to Sherbet fans and Gelato fans, bridging both communities.
Named for its high-test fuel aroma and rocket-launching effect. G6 (Jet Fuel) delivers a fast-acting, energetic sativa high with skunk-fuel aromatics that announce themselves from across the room.
Jet Fuel (G6) takes its secondary name from the aviation fuel grade — a nod to the overwhelming fuel aroma that makes it instantly identifiable.
Delicious Seeds' sweetly aromatic hybrid combining Power Plant's vigor with Lavender's floral, candy-like terpene profile. Produces a gentle, approachable euphoria suitable for all experience levels.
Cotton Candy Kush is one of the most recommended beginner-friendly strains in European cannabis culture due to its forgiving growth and pleasant, non-overwhelming effect profile.
California's platinum-level OG — a three-way cross producing silvery-white trichome coverage so dense the buds look plated. Heavy sedating effects arrive quickly and last unusually long.
Platinum OG's name refers to its silvery trichome coating that gives buds a platinum-like sheen — one of the most visually distinctive OG phenotypes.

Combining Banana OG's tropical banana aroma with Runtz's candy sweetness creates a flavor profile that's genuinely unlike anything else — a tropical banana candy experience delivering potent balanced effects.
Banana Runtz is among the most hyped Runtz crosses, commanding premium prices in California dispensaries for its extraordinary aroma profile.

A striking combination of grape candy sweetness and fuel-forward diesel. Grape Gas delivers a fast-hitting, intensely euphoric rush followed by deep physical relaxation — one of the most balanced high-potency modern strains.
Grape Gas is considered one of the elite crosses born from the Runtz-era of breeding and commands top-shelf prices in California's premium dispensary market.

A Spanish masterpiece with a rich caramel-chocolate-vanilla terpene profile reminiscent of the Latin American sweet. Delivers a warming, relaxing euphoria with pronounced sweet cream flavors rare in cannabis.
Dulce de Leche is considered one of the most authentic 'dessert terpene' strains in European cannabis — a benchmark for sweet, creamy flavor profiles.
One of BC's most notorious strains — named after a Vancouver drug trafficking organization. Black Tuna delivers extreme sedation with a sharp, pungent skunk-fish aroma.
Black Tuna was named after the Black Tuna Gang — a 1970s drug trafficking organization — cementing its outlaw cannabis heritage.

One of the original California purple strains from Mendocino County with a distinctive grape and skunk aroma. Purple Urkle is a parent of Granddaddy Purple and a foundational strain of the entire purple cannabis category.
Purple Urkle is one of the two parent strains of Granddaddy Purple — without Purple Urkle, the entire purple cannabis category as we know it would not exist.
A zesty, bright sativa with intense lemon candy aroma from the crossing of Lemon Skunk and Silver Haze. Lemon Haze delivers long-lasting, cheerful, motivating effects.
Lemon Haze inspired an entire family of lemon-skunk hybrid breeding that stretches into the modern market through Super Lemon Haze and Lemon Cherry Gelato.

Blue Dream crossed with Snoop Dogg's personal favorite Master Kush — an official Leafly collaboration strain. Snoop's Dream delivers Blue Dream's euphoric energy grounded by Master Kush's indica depth.
Snoop's Dream was developed as an official collaboration between Leafly and Snoop Dogg — one of the first celebrity co-designed cannabis strains with documented genetic providence.

A Chemdawg family member with extraordinary trichome production — buds appear galaxy-like under light, covered in glinting trichomes. Delivers a classic Chemdawg fuel-chemical aroma with euphoric, energizing effects.
Stardawg's trichome coverage is so dense that the buds appear to glow with starlike points of light under direct lighting — hence the name.
Gelato phenotype 47 — one of the most potent and flavor-forward of the entire Gelato family. Mochi (Gelato 47) produces dense, almost spherical buds with an intensely sweet, doughy cream aroma.
Gelato #47 'Mochi' tests consistently higher in potency than most other Gelato phenotypes and became a favorite among the highest-end California dispensaries.

DNA Genetics' powerhouse combination of Sour Diesel's classic New York fuel with Tangie's California orange citrus. Sour Tangie delivers extraordinary energy and focus with a terpene profile unlike anything else.
Sour Tangie is frequently cited by cannabis chefs and beverage makers as the most food-pairing-friendly strain due to its complex citrus-diesel terpene interaction.
Ohio's most beloved regional strain — Electric Lemon G is a Midwestern sativa phenomenon with a vivid electric lemon aroma and a clean, energizing effect that made it a regional landmark.
Electric Lemon G is one of the few cannabis strains to achieve iconic status in the American Midwest rather than on the West or East Coast.

An elite, clone-only OG Kush phenotype revered in California dispensary culture. Mothership OG's complex terpene expression and consistent potency make it a benchmark strain for OG quality evaluation.
Mothership OG is a clone-only strain — no seeds exist commercially. Clones change hands for hundreds of dollars each in the California legacy market.
Symbiotic Genetics' combination of MAC's creamy gas with Grape Stomper's punch. MAC Stomper delivers extraordinary trichome production with a complex sweet-fuel-grape aroma.
MAC Stomper is a showcase strain for Symbiotic Genetics and is frequently cited in breeding circles as one of the finest MAC offspring ever developed.
A heavy-hitting OG cross named for its overwhelming fuel aroma. Gas Monkey delivers the full Chemdawg experience in a more compact, manageable plant structure with exceptional resin production.
Gas Monkey's name references both the fuel-dominant aroma and the 'monkey wrench' Chemdawg-style effect — something that fundamentally alters your experience of time.
A beginner-friendly hybrid with an intensely sweet cotton candy aroma driven by floral lavender and fruity Power Plant terpenes. Delivers a smooth, gentle euphoria.
Cotton Candy is one of the most recommended strains for first-time cannabis consumers due to its mild potency, pleasant aroma and non-anxiety-inducing effect profile.

A California hybrid combining Chemdawg's fuel complexity with Tangerine Dream's citrus sweetness. Mob Boss delivers a surprisingly energetic, social sativa-leaning effect from what appears to be indica-dominant genetics.
Mob Boss is one of the few Chemdawg-family hybrids that produces a predominantly sativa-style effect despite its architectural indica growth pattern.
A powerhouse cross of two modern classics — Do-Si-Dos and Gelato 41. Dolato produces extraordinary trichome density and a complex floral-sweet-fuel terpene profile. Heavy, lasting relaxation.
Dolato is used as a parent strain by numerous elite breeders and its genetics appear in dozens of high-end 2022-2024 releases.
A striking combination of Purple Punch's grape candy and Wedding Cake's vanilla richness. Double Cup produces visually stunning purple buds with a layered sweet dessert terpene profile.
Double Cup won multiple awards at the 2020 Emerald Cup and is considered one of the finest purple hybrid expressions of the modern era.
Archive Seed Bank's high-potency fusion delivering creamy candy and fuel aromatics alongside knockout balanced effects. Jokerz consistently tests at the top end of commercial THC ranges.
Jokerz is one of Archive Seed Bank's most popular modern releases and has been crossed extensively to produce a new generation of ultra-high-potency hybrids.
Nirvana Seeds' tropical indica named for its persistent fruity papaya-mango aroma. An approachable, moderate-potency indica with strong garden performance and crowd-pleasing smooth effects.
Papaya is one of Nirvana Seeds' top-selling indica strains and has introduced millions of European consumers to fruit-forward indica genetics.
An aggressive-sounding name for an equally aggressive hybrid. Slapz delivers immediate, face-flushing euphoria from Runtz's candy profile amplified by Grease Monkey's resinous body weight.
Slapz is among the fastest-rising strains in California dispensary sales in 2023, praised for consistent quality and an immediately recognizable effect onset.

An indica-dominant cross known for extraordinary THC content that has tested above 33% in some lab results. Oreoz delivers an intensely sweet cookies-and-cream aroma and a powerful, disorienting effect.
Oreoz has tested above 33% THC in multiple lab analyses, placing it among the top 5 highest-THC strains ever officially documented.
A crisp, refreshing sativa-leaning hybrid with a prominent sour Granny Smith apple aroma. Sour Apple delivers functional, uplifting energy with a clean, non-sedating effect profile.
Sour Apple's precise Granny Smith aroma is driven by a rare terpene combination of terpinolene and alpha-pinene that creates the illusion of fresh-cut apple.
One of the most beloved strains to emerge from the Midwest — Strawberry Fields delivers a true strawberry candy aroma and a smooth, uplifting effect that made it a regional cultural landmark.
Strawberry Fields is an Ohio legacy strain that achieved wider fame after appearing in several cannabis publication strain reviews in the mid-2000s.
LPC x Las Vegas Lemon Skunk
A cross from DNA Genetics that achieves near-perfect balance of lemon freshness and OG earthiness. Lemon OG delivers a fast-acting, full-spectrum euphoria.
Lemon OG was developed by DNA Genetics in Nevada — one of the few iconic cannabis strains to originate in the desert Southwest.

Oregon's unofficial state sativa — Dream Beaver combines Blue Dream's dependable California genetics with Plushberry's fruity PNW character. A proud Pacific Northwest contribution to cannabis culture.
Dream Beaver takes its unusual name from Oregon's state animal — the beaver — as a statement of Pacific Northwest cannabis pride.

Cousin to Colombian Gold but grown along Colombia's Caribbean coast. Santa Marta Gold has a distinctly spicy, earthy aromatic profile and a euphoric soaring high used by coastal communities for generations.
Santa Marta Gold was one of the most sought-after Colombian exports of the 1970s American market, often preferred over Colombian Gold for its unique coastal-grown character.

A high-altitude Mexican sativa cultivated in the Sierra Madre mountains. Michoacan produces a clean, functional cerebral high with earthy pine and citrus notes — the agricultural staple of Mexico's highland cannabis tradition.
Michoacan cannabis formed the backbone of Mexico's legal export trade to the US in the early 1970s before the DEA's Operation Trampoline eradicated much of the crop.

The broad family of North Indian cannabis landraces spanning the Kullu Valley and beyond. Traditionally grown for both ganja (flowers) and charas (hash). Gentle, contemplative, spiritual effect profile.
Cannabis cultivation in North India predates written history and appears in Vedic texts as soma — a sacred substance used by ancient Aryan cultures for spiritual communion.

A high-altitude East African sativa grown in Ethiopia's central highlands. Produces a clear, spacious, almost meditation-like cerebral effect with an unusual herbal-floral aroma unlike any other landrace.
Ethiopia is home to some of the world's oldest cannabis genetic diversity — researchers have documented over 30 distinct landrace phenotypes across different highland regions.
A West African pure sativa with a uniquely spiced, almost incense-like aroma. Senegalese cannabis has been cultivated along the Sahel for centuries in connection with Islamic Sufi traditions.
Senegalese cannabis has documented ties to Sufi brotherhoods of West Africa who incorporated it into meditative practice over centuries.
A heavy indica from Pakistan's lush Swat Valley — distinct from Hindu Kush varieties in its broader leaf structure and sweeter hash profile. Produces extraordinary resin used for Swat Valley charras.
The Swat Valley was Alexander the Great's final conquest — cannabis has been cultivated there since before recorded history.

A particularly potent phenotype of Mozambican sativa known for an unusual chemical-earthy aroma and intense cerebral effect. Used by Mozambican fishermen for endurance and alertness during long ocean voyages.

Mozambique Poison inspired the naming convention of 'Durban Poison' — the South African breeder who named Durban Poison is said to have been referencing the intense Mozambican sativas he had encountered.
Sensi Seeds' classic early-finishing sativa designed for Northern European outdoor growing. Early Pearl was one of the first cannabis strains adapted specifically for cold, short-season climates.
Early Pearl was one of the first strains specifically developed for outdoor cultivation in cold Northern European climates — a breakthrough for growers in Scandinavia and the UK.

Dutch Passion's early outdoor hybrid — one of the first commercial strains to combine purple genetics with reliable outdoor performance. Shaman produces stunning purple coloration and a balanced, euphoric effect.
Shaman was Dutch Passion's first commercially successful purple strain and helped establish the market for visually striking, colorful cannabis in European seed catalogs.
Sensi Seeds' legendary Haze-dominant sativa with exceptional potency and silver-white trichome coverage. Silver Haze delivers a cerebral, psychedelic experience rivaling Original Haze in intensity.
Silver Haze was developed as Sensi Seeds' commercial answer to the near-impossible-to-grow Original Haze — providing similar psychedelic experience in a more manageable plant.

Green House Seeds founder Arjan Roskam's signature Haze variety. A complex sativa delivering soaring, long-lasting cerebral effects that showcased why Amsterdam's legendary cannabis culture was built on Haze genetics.
Arjan's Haze is named for Green House Seeds founder Arjan Roskam — dubbed 'The King of Cannabis' by Vice Media in their 2011 documentary series.
A selected phenotype of the legendary Skunk #1 that expressed even more pronounced skunky terpenes and slightly higher potency. Became its own independent variety through selective propagation.
Skunk #11 represents the commercial breeding philosophy of the 1980s — selecting the best phenotypes from already-legendary strains to further refine genetic expression.

A White Widow derivative selected for even heavier trichome production and a slightly more indica-leaning effect. Snow White's bud appearance — entirely white with crystal — is among the most visually striking of classic Dutch strains.
Snow White was developed by Nirvana Seeds as an accessible alternative to White Widow — providing similar visual and potency qualities in a more forgiving cultivation package.
A crossing of the beloved Strawberry Cough with White Widow's resin powerhouse genetics. Strawberry Ice delivers fruity strawberry terps wrapped in a blanket of white trichomes.
Strawberry Ice was one of the first strains to successfully transfer Strawberry Cough's unique berry aroma into a high-resin growing package suitable for extraction.
Sensi Seeds' cold-climate-ready outdoor hybrid combining Skunk's potency with Early Pearl's fast finishing. One of the most important strains for developing cannabis cultivation in Northern Europe.
Early Skunk enabled cannabis cultivation across Northern Finland, Scandinavia and Scotland for the first time — opening up markets that had never been able to grow their own.
Green House Seeds' award-winning combination of two Dutch legends delivering a unique tropical storm of euphoria and body relaxation. Multiple Cannabis Cup winner and one of GHS's signature strains.
El Nino won the Cannabis Cup in 1996 and 1998 and helped establish Green House Seeds as one of Europe's premier cannabis seed companies.
Green House Seeds' spiritual strain delivering a calm, profound, contemplative high suitable for meditation and creative work. One of the most mellow high-CBD strains of the Haze family.
The Church is one of the few Haze-family strains designed specifically for a calm, non-psychedelic effect — a deliberate counter to the intense Haze experience.

Dutch Passion's commercial Afghani-dominant hybrid named after the ancient city. Mazar delivers powerfully heavy body effects with exceptional yield, making it one of the best-selling indica seeds of the early 2000s.
Mazar was Dutch Passion's best-selling indica for over a decade and played a key role in establishing Afghanistan's genetic heritage within mainstream European cannabis culture.
Dutch Passion's classic outdoor sativa designed for reliability across Northern European climates. One of the foundational commercial cannabis strains and Dutch Passion's original signature variety.
Passion #1 was Dutch Passion's first internationally successful strain and established the Amsterdam seed bank model as a viable commercial enterprise in the early 1980s.
One of the original California orange-scented strains predating the Tangie breeding movement. California Orange was one of the most popular strains of the 1980s for its distinct citrus character.
California Orange is the genetic ancestor of the entire modern citrus cannabis breeding tradition — its orange terpene profile inspired decades of subsequent orange-forward breeding programs.
A reverent, spiritual OG Kush phenotype with an earthy, pine-dominant aroma and deeply meditative body effects. Church OG delivers the classic OG experience with exceptional consistency.
Church OG earned its name from the reverent silence that tends to fall over a room after it's passed around — its effects reportedly inspire deep contemplation.

An intriguing sativa-leaning hybrid delivering paranoia-free cerebral stimulation despite its ominous name. Conspiracy Kush's clear-headed, idea-generating high made it popular in Washington's early legal market.
Conspiracy Kush became one of Washington State's signature strains in the first years of legalization, representing the Pacific Northwest's unique approach to cannabis cultivation.
DJ Short's other blueberry masterpiece — Blue Moonshine delivers the quintessential blueberry aroma in a more compact, vigorous plant than standard Blueberry. Fast-finishing and beginner-friendly.
Blue Moonshine comes from the same DJ Short breeding program that produced the legendary Blueberry — it shares the award-winning blueberry terpene profile in a more commercially viable package.
A specific Afghani landrace strain known for its exceptionally large, dense bud formation and heavy hash production. Used for generations in traditional Afghan hash-making communities.
Afghani Bull Rider is one of dozens of distinct Afghani landrace expressions preserved by international seed banks seeking to document Afghanistan's extraordinary cannabis genetic diversity.
Barney's Farm's award-winning sativa hybrid with striking red-purple pigmentation and a complex sweet, fruity aroma. Red Dragon delivers an energizing, uplifting effect with manageable potency.
Red Dragon's red-purple coloration is caused by anthocyanins activated by temperature changes — one of the most visually distinctive sativa hybrids available.
Ethos Genetics' acclaimed hybrid combining GSC's cookie genetics with Mandarin Sunset's vivid citrus character. One of the finest examples of the Cookies x Citrus breeding movement.
Mandarin Cookies V2 is considered by many collectors to be one of the most important Ethos Genetics releases — a benchmark for citrus-cookie hybrid development.
A purple phenotype-selected version of the award-winning Tropicana Cookies producing deep purple coloration alongside the strain's signature tropical citrus aroma.
Tropicana Cookies Purple consistently produces some of the most visually striking purple-orange bud combinations of any modern strain — a social media perennial favorite.
Sensi Seeds' potency-amplified version of the legendary Skunk #1. Adding Afghani genetics boosted resin production and body effect while maintaining Skunk's vigor and commercial appeal.
Super Skunk won the Cannabis Cup in 1990 and was one of the first demonstrations that Skunk #1 could be improved through selective crossing — opening the floodgates of Dutch hybrid breeding.

The most celebrated of all Northern Lights phenotypes — NL#5 was selected by Nevil Schoenmakers for its exceptional resin production, consistency, and rich earthy-sweet aroma. A cornerstone of global breeding.

Northern Lights #5 is arguably the single most influential indica phenotype ever preserved — its genetics appear in hundreds of legendary strains including Jack Herer, Super Silver Haze and Amnesia Haze.

TGA Subcool's sativa masterpiece — a cross of two of his finest creations producing electric, clear-headed euphoria and a complex citrus-pine aroma that earned it legendary status in the US medical market.
Pandora's Box was developed by TGA Subcool — a legendary Oregon-based breeder who reshaped American cannabis genetics through his 'Willy Wonka' approach to flavor-forward breeding.
Another TGA Subcool masterpiece with a unique mango-passion fruit aroma and a vortex-like, spiraling cerebral high. Widely considered one of the finest Pacific Northwest sativas.
Vortex was TGA Subcool's personal favorite creation — he described its mango terpene profile as 'the most complex and unusual I've ever encountered in a sativa.'
TGA Subcool's citrus masterpiece delivering intense mandarin orange aroma and joyful, uplifting effects. One of the most reviewed mood-elevating strains on Leafly.
Agent Orange consistently ranks among the top 5 mood-boosting strains on Leafly and is frequently recommended for daytime depression management by cannabis-friendly medical practitioners.
TGA Subcool's candy-sweet creation with an intense orange Gummy Bear aroma and a playful, uplifting effect. Jilly Bean became one of the most beloved daytime strains in the Western US medical market.
Jilly Bean's aroma is so distinctly orange candy that it's been used in aroma therapy demonstrations and cannabis sommelier training courses as a benchmark for citrus terpene identification.
TGA Subcool's take on the classic Trainwreck lineage — adding Pre-98 Bubba Kush tempers the sativa's intensity while preserving the energetic cerebral rush.
Qrazy Train was one of TGA Subcool's most commercially successful strains and is credited with introducing Trainwreck genetics to a new generation of Pacific Northwest breeders.
TGA Subcool's legendary ultra-potent sativa with chemical-lemon aroma and a cerebral experience described by users as 'ripping' through mental barriers. Extremely fast-acting for a pure sativa.
Jack the Ripper has been lab-tested above 25% THC for a pure sativa — an extraordinary achievement in a plant type typically producing lower percentages.

TGA Subcool's indica cross producing intensely fruity, plum-cherry-berry aromas and deeply relaxing body effects. Plushberry's unusual flavor profile makes it one of the most distinct indicas in TGA's lineup.
Plushberry's fruit-forward terpene profile was revolutionary when it debuted — its plum-cherry aroma opened new territory in indica flavor breeding that influenced dozens of subsequent cultivators.
Symbiotic Genetics' logical union of two California powerhouses. Dosi Punch inherits Do-Si-Dos' OG potency and Purple Punch's grape candy aroma for a deeply relaxing, dessert-scented experience.
Dosi Punch is among the most cross-used modern strains — its genetics appear in dozens of elite 2022-2024 releases from California's top breeders.
Dying Breed Seeds' collaboration cross delivers rainbow candy sweetness from Zkittlez and OG depth from Do-Si-Dos. One of the finest candy-meets-kush flavor profiles in modern cannabis.
Rainbow Belts is frequently compared to eating a bag of actual rainbow candy — terpene analysts have documented over 40 distinct aromatic compounds in its profile.
Cannarado Genetics' high-potency creation delivering a complex tropical-fuel terpene profile unlike anything else. Gastro Pop's genetic complexity produces extraordinary phenotype diversity.
Gastro Pop became a collector's item strain in 2022 with some phenotypes testing above 30% THC and producing terpene profiles compared to exotic tropical fruit cocktails.
Compound Genetics' four-way masterpiece delivering a complex tropical aroma of fresh apples and bananas with exceptional potency. One of the most complex modern breeding achievements.
Apples and Bananas' four-parent lineage represents one of the most complex genetic combinations attempted in modern cannabis breeding and consistently exceeds expectations in both aroma and potency.

Archive Seed Bank's numbered project strain that became a cult classic. Named for its development coordinates, Project 4516 delivers extraordinary trichome coverage and complex chemical-sweet terpenes.
Project 4516 is one of Archive Seed Bank's most traded genetics — its unusual numbering reflects the scientific precision their breeding program applies to cannabis genetics.
One of the most potent modern crosses — combining Kush Mints' minty fuel with Gushers' tropical burst. Gush Mints produces extraordinary resin and a one-of-a-kind minty tropical effect profile.
Gush Mints consistently ranks among the top 10 highest-rated strains in California dispensaries and commands premium prices for its consistent quality and extraordinary potency.
A fruit-forward modern hybrid with a distinctly sweet apricot jam aroma and smooth, functional euphoria. Apricot Jelly represents the cutting edge of fruit-terpene breeding.
Apricot Jelly's terpene profile is dominated by rare terpenes not commonly found in cannabis — making it a subject of study in cannabis aroma research.
The precise San Fernando Valley phenotype of OG Kush — indistinguishable by most consumers from SFV OG but technically a distinct selection. A critical breeding strain in California's OG family tree.
The distinction between SFV OG and SFV OG Kush has been debated in California cannabis circles for over a decade — most agree they are distinct selections of the same original plant.

A DNA Genetics cross combining OG Kush structure with vivid lemon citrus terpenes. One of the finest lemon-OG hybrids ever bred — achieving perfect balance between earthy OG depth and bright lemon freshness.
Lemon OG Kush helped define the 'citrus OG' sub-category — a breeding direction that now encompasses dozens of highly popular commercial strains.
DNA Genetics' specifically selected OG Kush clone #18 — one of the purest and most classical expressions of OG Kush terpenes and effects available in commercial form.
OG #18 represents DNA Genetics' claim to have preserved one of the most authentic original OG Kush phenotypes — a claim vigorously debated among California OG enthusiasts.
One of the most potent OG phenotypes — Ghost OG produces citrus-focused OG terpenes with extreme trichome density that make buds appear almost translucent under light.
Ghost OG's name references its near-translucent trichome coverage — buds look pale, almost ghostly, due to the extreme density of clear trichomes.
A critical OG phenotype and the male parent of Purple Punch. Larry OG's combining of two classic California OG expressions produced one of the finest-balanced OG varieties available.
Larry OG is best known as the male parent of Purple Punch — without Larry OG, one of the most popular modern indicas would not exist.
A Midwestern entry to the OG Kush family named during the Obama administration. Obama Kush delivers balanced mind-body effects with a fuel-earth aroma characteristic of its Afghani-OG lineage.
Obama Kush originated during Barack Obama's presidency when a Michigan breeder created it as a political tribute — one of many politically-named strains that emerged from that era.
A compact autoflowering strain from Royal Queen Seeds that produces a predictable automatic cycle. Perfect for stealth grows and beginner cultivators.
Royal Dwarf can complete its entire grow cycle from seed to harvest in under 8 weeks — one of the fastest-growing cannabis varieties ever developed.
The autoflowering version of one of the world's most famous indicas. NL Auto delivers the classic Northern Lights indica experience in a rapid automatic cycle perfect for any skill level.
Northern Lights Auto can be grown from seed to harvest in just 9-10 weeks, making it one of the most time-efficient high-quality indicas available to home cultivators.
A fast-finishing berry hybrid engineered for maximum fruity aroma and minimal grow time. One of the most beginner-friendly options for cultivators seeking flavor-forward genetics.
Fastberry was developed as part of a new generation of 'fast phenotype' strains — not autoflowering but photoperiod plants selectively bred for dramatically reduced flowering times.
The autoflowering version of Gorilla Glue #4 — delivering the same extraordinary resin production and potency in a compact automatic package.
Gorilla Glue Auto successfully transfers GG#4's legendary resin density into an automatic variety — one of the most challenging genetic transfers in autoflowering breeding history.
A mega-cross of two of California's top-selling modern strains. Jealousy x Runtz combines Seed Junky's creamy-gas genetics with Runtz's tropical candy profile for extraordinary potency.
Jealousy x Runtz is considered a 'summit cross' — the combination of two strains that were both at their respective peaks of popularity when bred together.
A tropical-sweet Gelato cross delivering intense guava fruit notes alongside the classic creamy Gelato character. One of the most aromatic and unique Gelato crosses available.
Guava Gelato's tropical fruit character is driven by a rare combination of terpinolene and myrcene that creates the illusion of fresh-cut guava fruit.
A Cookies Fam classic that predates their most famous strains. Pink Panties delivers a floral, tropical aroma with a smooth, full-body indica effect — and is the female parent of Sunset Sherbet.

Pink Panties is genetically one of the most important strains in modern cannabis history — as the female parent of Sunset Sherbet, it is a grandparent of Gelato, Ice Cream Cake, and dozens of modern classics.
A powerhouse cross from BC Bud Depot combining two legendary heavy-hitters. Animal Cookies delivers an extreme, fast-acting indica effect with GSC's sweet cookie terps amplified by Fire OG's fuel.
Animal Cookies is a parent of Animal Mints and numerous other elite modern strains — a critical node in the modern Cookies breeding family tree.

A Pacific Northwest legend with an extraordinary black cherry and grape soda aroma unlike any other strain. Black Cherry Soda's deep purple coloration and complex fruit terps made it a regional cult classic.
Black Cherry Soda is one of the Pacific Northwest's most protected legacy genetics — original cuts are held by a small group of Oregon and Washington legacy growers.
DNA Genetics' cross of two different lemon-expressing Skunk phenotypes that produces an intensely lemon-citrus aroma. Lemon Skunk was a foundational strain in the citrus-forward breeding movement.
Lemon Skunk is a parent of Super Lemon Haze — one of the most awarded sativas of all time — making it an indirect but critical ancestor of dozens of modern citrus strains.
Reeferman Seeds' classic cross of Afghani and Thai landrace genetics producing an unusual sweet fruit aroma reminiscent of the chewing gum. Delivers a clear, sociable, uplifting effect.
Juicy Fruit takes its name from the identical aroma it produces — scientifically explained by a rare combination of 2-methylbutyl acetate and other ester compounds found in the actual gum.
A four-way hybrid from Twompson Nursery combining some of California's finest genetics. Green Ribbon delivers balanced euphoria with cerebral clarity and physical relaxation.
Green Ribbon was a popular strain in California's early medical dispensary era and helped establish the concept of multi-parent crosses as a distinct breeding discipline.
A natural flavor pairing — GSC's cookie genetics with DJ Short's legendary Blueberry producing sweet blueberry pastry aromas and a deeply relaxing euphoric effect.
Blue Cookies won multiple cannabis awards in California in 2015 and was one of the first Cookies-family crosses to explicitly embrace flavor pairing as its primary breeding goal.

Delicious Seeds' take on combining Jack Herer's legendary genetics with Critical Mass's commercial yield potential. A perfectly balanced strain delivering Jack's cerebral energy in a more productive package.
Critical Jack represents the logical evolution of Jack Herer genetics — taking the legendary strain's effect profile and applying modern commercial breeding techniques to improve yield.
Soma Seeds' legendary three-way Kush hybrid with a distinctly floral, lavender and hash aroma. Multi-Cannabis-Cup winner and one of the most complex aromatic profiles in indica genetics.
Lavender won the Cannabis Cup in 2005 and is notable for containing exceptionally high linalool content — the same terpene responsible for lavender's calming aroma in aromatherapy.
A specific Thai landrace phenotype famous for its unique chocolate and coffee aroma — a result of unprecedented terpene expression. One of the rarest genetics in the cannabis world.
Chocolate Thai was almost entirely extinct by the 1990s. A small number of original seeds were preserved by a California breeder and selectively propagated — it is Chocolope's primary ancestor.
Brothers Grimm's space-themed sativa that achieves near-psychedelic intensities of cerebral stimulation from a compact, manageable plant. Named for its launch-like effect onset.
Apollo 11 was developed by Brothers Grimm using C99 genetics selected specifically for maximum psychoactive effect in a minimal plant profile — successfully achieving both goals.

A challenging but rewarding Canadian sativa with extraordinary potency that arrives in waves. Killing Fields demands patience from both cultivator and consumer — but delivers an unforgettable cerebral experience.
Killing Fields is one of Canada's most potent legacy sativas — its name references the demanding nature of both growing it and experiencing its effects as a consumer.

A pure Afghani indica preserved by Tom Hill representing one of the cleanest landrace genetic expressions available. Deep Chunk's hash-dominant aroma and complete body sedation represent the purest Afghani experience.
Deep Chunk is considered by experienced growers to be one of the purest landrace Afghani expressions available in commercial seed form — a living piece of cannabis history.
An Oregon classic combining DJ Short's Blueberry with local OG genetics. Blue Satellite delivers fruity blueberry aromas grounded by OG earthiness for a uniquely Pacific Northwest experience.
Blue Satellite is an Oregon legacy strain that embodies the Pacific Northwest philosophy of combining California OG genetics with regional fruity varieties.
BC's beloved tropical sativa — Island Sweet Skunk delivers grapefruit and tropical citrus aromas from its Pink Grapefruit parent combined with Skunk's commercial vigor.
Island Sweet Skunk is deeply embedded in British Columbia's cannabis culture and is one of the few strains that BC legacy growers universally acknowledge as a defining regional genetics.
